final:
module RefModule(
    input iCLK,
    input iRST,
    output reg [3:0] oCNT
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge iCLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (iRST) begin
        oCNT <= 4'b0; // Reset to 0
    end else begin
        oCNT <= oCNT + 1; // Increment count
    end
end

endmodule
